title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - RML Hospital - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
